kycDocumentDetails.name: Driving License
kycDocumentDetails.description: The Driving License is an ID card used for identification purposes.

kycDocumentDetails.name: Vehicle Registration Front
kycDocumentDetails.description: A Vehicle Registration Front ID Card is a document issued by the government that contains essential information about a vehicle's registration details, typically found on the front side of the main vehicle registration card.

kycDocumentDetails.name: Vehicle Registration Back
kycDocumentDetails.description: A Vehicle Registration Back ID Card is a document issued by the government that contains essential information about a vehicle's registration details, typically found on the reverse side of the main vehicle registration card.

kycDocumentDetails.name: Civil ID Front
kycDocumentDetails.description: A Civil ID Front ID Card is the front side of a national identification card that contains personal details such as name, date of birth, nationality, and photograph.

kycDocumentDetails.name: Civil ID Back
kycDocumentDetails.description: A Civil ID Back ID Card is the reverse side of a national identification card that contains additional personal information, barcode, and other security features.
